g.text: A. T. Murray (1919) — Native target-as-hyperedge visualization

text.style: font-size: 11px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; text-anchor: start; fill: #94a3b8

g.text: Readable weighted core: 34 of 124 attribute nodes; 10 of 94 target hyperedges; 187 of 992 incidences.

text.style: font-size: 9px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; text-anchor: start; fill: #94a3b8

g.text: Blue circles are attributes; amber hulls or squares are target hyperedges. Selection is ranked by summed incidence weight.
